Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Continued To Jan-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Curtis Oler for and with Wilma Batiste (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it appears to be a copy of the will and not the original. Mr. Oler stated that he filed two declarations this morning indicating chain of possession (copies provided) and that the original will is attached to the petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission for review of said declarations.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
